title: The Fluff² smp
description:
The modpack for the Fluff² smp

Adds: Space, weapons, bosses, amour, building stuff, tech and skills
body:
# Fluff²
Welcome to Fluff², a Minecraft modpack that aim to blend the aesthetic of steampunk with RPG elements, including weapons and structure rich world generation all in a neat package.

## ⚔️ Mastery of Weapons:
Equip yourself with a diverse array of weaponry, each lootable or craftable, From a soul reaping scythe to a big hammer, conquer the challenges of Fluff² with style and flair.

## 🏭 Industrial Revolution:
Transform the landscape with steampunk-themed factories and industrial complexes. Utilize advanced machinery to automate resource gathering, refining, and crafting processes. Dive into the heart of the industrial revolution.
